name: ai-demo-video-generator
description: AI-powered website demo video generator — Playwright recordings + Remotion overlays + AI voiceover

scripts.setup: npm install && npx playwright install chromium && cd remotion && npm install
scripts.render: cd remotion && npx remotion render src/index.ts DemoVideo out/DemoVideo.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18
scripts.build: node capture.js && cd remotion && npx remotion render src/index.ts DemoVideo out/DemoVideo.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18
